name: 9" Pleated Ceramic Decorative Vase Blue - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Enhance the look and feel of your home with this Pleated Ceramic Decorative Vase from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made of ceramic in a blue hue, this decorative vase features a pleated design to add visual interest to your space. You can fill this watertight vase with fresh blooms or faux florals and display it on any shelf or table.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
